headline: Trump’s Iran Pivots Spotlight Washington’s Insider Trade Threat
summary: (Bloomberg) -- In the oil market, volatility recently spiked to levels not seen since the onset of the Covid-19 pandemic. Commodities and stocks globally have whipsawed in response to every twist and turn in the Iran war: A strike, a pause, a threat to wipe out a civilization, a ceasefire; then a deal, no deal, and the prospect of one again.Most Read from BloombergAnthropic’s Mythos Model Is Being Accessed by Unauthorized UsersInside Alex Cooper’s Unwell: Tears, Screaming and Employees Looking f

headline: Assessing CME Group (CME) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: CME Group (CME) is back in focus after recent share price weakness, with the stock down roughly 6% over the past month even as its 1 year total return sits around 13%. See our latest analysis for CME Group. The recent 6% slide in CME’s share price over the past month, alongside softer 7 day and 30 day share price returns, contrasts with a 1 year total shareholder return of 12.58% and a strong 3 year total shareholder return of 76.19%. This suggests that longer term momentum has remained...
